Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Continued To May-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application To File Unredacted Dec Of Jane Doe Under Seal
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JANE DOE (A PSEUDONYM) Application To File Unredacted Declaration Of Jane Doe Under Seal is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/hk

Defendant German Motors Corporation, John Doe No. 1, John Doe No. 2, And John Doe No. 3 Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted and this case is stayed pending the completion of the arbitration proceedings. Plaintiff does not deny that she signed the Agreement to Arbitrate Disputes and a reasonable inference from her declaration is that she did. Plaintiff's argument that the Agreement to Arbitrate Disputes is unconscionable fails because the only basis which she asserts that the agreement is substantively unconscionable (the discovery provision in the AAA employment rules) has been held not to be substantively unconscionable. (Roman v. Superior Court (2009) 172 Cal. App. 4th 1462, 1475-76). Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/jk
